prose: This positive call rests on curated CTD Parkinson's DirectEvidence flagged as diagnostic [E1], which anchors the evidence-ranked mechanistic hypothesis. Mechanistically, the molecular initiating event is grounded in MitoCarta3.0 Complex-I Q-site subunits, with the adverse outcome plausibly localized to the Kamath 2022 SOX6/AGTR1 vulnerable dopaminergic-neuron population [E2]—a cell-type–specific vulnerability that coheres with the attached AOP pathway. Brain-penetrance modeling supports plausible CNS exposure, satisfying a necessary target-tissue condition [E5]. This mechanistic chain is corroborated, not established, by human observations: the Langston 1983 case series documented parkinsonism in exposed individuals [E4], strengthening but not proving the hypothesis. ToxCast coverage is thin, consistent with a research reagent, and is treated as anti-diagnostic corroboration only—its sparseness neither undermines nor confirms the call [E3]. Overall the tier remains curated_anchored_only: confidence derives from curated mechanism [E1], with assay and epidemiology providing convergent, secondary support rather than independent causal proof.

citations.reference: Davis AP, Wiegers TC, Johnson RJ, et al. Comparative Toxicogenomics Database (CTD): update 2023. Nucleic Acids Research. 2023;51(D1):D1257-D1262. Mechanistic scaffold: OECD Adverse Outcome Pathway Wiki. AOP 3: Inhibition of the mitochondrial complex I of nigro-striatal neurons leads to parkinsonian motor deficits (WPHA/WNT Endorsed).

citations.detail: MIE grounded in MitoCarta Complex-I Q-site subunits; adverse outcome in the Kamath SOX6/AGTR1 vulnerable dopaminergic-neuron population.
citations.reference: Rath S, Sharma R, Gupta R, et al. MitoCarta3.0: an updated mitochondrial proteome now with sub-organelle localization and pathway annotations. Nucleic Acids Research. 2021;49(D1):D1541-D1547. Kamath T, Abdulraouf A, Burris SJ, et al. Single-cell genomic profiling of human dopamine neurons identifies a population that selectively degenerates in Parkinson's disease. Nature Neuroscience. 2022;25(5):588-595.
U.S. EPA ToxCast/Tox21 invitroDB (v4.2), accessed through the NICEATM Integrated Chemical Environment (ICE). Active hitcalls only; queried on the salt-form-correct record.

causal parkinsonism (case series) (Langston 1983 (Science)). Quantified PD/AD exposure risk curated from published cohorts and meta-analyses (e.g., Tanner et al. 2011, Environmental Health Perspectives; Pezzoli & Cereda 2013, Neurology).

Meng F, Xi Y, Huang J, Ayers PW. A curated diverse molecular database of blood-brain barrier permeability with chemical descriptors (B3DB). Scientific Data. 2021;8:289. Daina A, Zoete V. A BOILED-Egg to predict gastrointestinal absorption and brain access of small molecules. ChemMedChem. 2016;11(11):1117-1121.
